items.title: Medical Tapes Industry Report 2024, with Profiles of Leading Companies, including 3M, Johnson & Johnson, Smith & Nephew, B. Braun Melsungen and Molnlycke Health Care
items.author: Researchandmarkets.Com
items.description: The global medical tapes market is expected to grow from $5.6 billion in 2024 to $7 billion by 2029, driven by healthcare advancements, an aging population, and technological innovations. The market is segmented by product, application, and end-user, with North America and Europe leading the growth.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: 3M is mentioned as one of the leading companies in the medical tapes industry, indicating its strong market position and potential for growth.
Johnson & Johnson is also listed as a leading company in the medical tapes market, suggesting its significant presence and competitiveness in the industry.
Smith & Nephew is included among the top companies in the medical tapes market, highlighting its importance and potential for future performance.

items.title: Global Artificial Sweeteners Market to Observe Growth at a CAGR of ~4% by 2030 | DelveInsight
items.author: Delveinsight
items.description: The global artificial sweeteners market is expected to grow at a CAGR of around 4% from 2024 to 2030, driven by the increasing demand for low-calorie foods due to the rising rates of diabetes, hypertension, and obesity, as well as ongoing research and development efforts leading to new product launches.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Ingredion is mentioned as one of the notable companies operating in the artificial sweeteners market, indicating its involvement and potential contribution to the market growth.
ADM is mentioned as one of the notable companies operating in the artificial sweeteners market, indicating its involvement and potential contribution to the market growth.
